tasks.subject: Task 0: Swift Package scaffold + runnable .app
tasks.description:
Swift package (WebPicCore lib + WebPicApp executable + tests, macOS 14), minimal core + smoke test, SwiftUI @main App, placeholder RootView, Scripts/bundle.sh producing dist/WebPic.app.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Package.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/WebPicCore.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/WebPicMain.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/RootView.swift", "Scripts/bundle.sh", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/SmokeTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift build && swift test && bash Scripts/bundle.sh && open dist/WebPic.app", "acceptanceCriteria": ["swift build exits 0", "swift test exits 0", "bundle.sh writes dist/WebPic.app and it launches a titled window"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Color tokens (WPPalette + hex init + environment)
tasks.description:
Color(hex:) init, WPPalette light/dark with exact reference hexes, wpPalette EnvironmentKey.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicCore/Theme/Color+Hex.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Theme/WPPalette.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Theme/WPPaletteEnvironment.swift", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/ColorHexTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter ColorHexTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Color(hex:) gives correct sRGB components", "WPPalette.light/.dark expose all tokens", "swift test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ThemeManager (system + manual override, persisted)
Task 3: Domain models + Settings (Codable)
tasks.description:
Enums, Preset table, Settings (Codable, .default), WebPicImage + ImageStatus.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicCore/Models/Enums.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Models/Preset.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Models/Settings.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Models/WebPicImage.swift", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/SettingsTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter SettingsTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Settings Codable round-trips", "Preset table correct", "Settings.default matches reference"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: AppStore (@Observable) + reducers
tasks.description:
formatBytes, MockData.seedImages, @Observable AppStore with addImages/select/remove/clearAll/persistSettings.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicCore/AppStore.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/MockData.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Formatting.swift", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/AppStoreTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter AppStoreTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["addImages seeds+selects+settings tab", "select from batch -> settings", "remove reselects", "formatBytes German formatting"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Sidebar view
tasks.description:
statusColor helper, GradientSwatch, ImageRow (hover remove, selection tint, status overlay), SidebarView over .regularMaterial.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicApp/Sidebar/SidebarView.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Sidebar/ImageRow.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Shared/GradientSwatch.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Shared/StatusColor.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["title+version+add+Alle Bilder count", "rows show thumb/name/dims/status dot/remove", "update pill conditional -> sheet .update", "Hell/Dunkel sets theme.appearance"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Toolbar + routing + empty state + RootView wiring
tasks.description:
EmptyImportView, SettingsPlaceholderView, MainView (routing + toolbar), RootView (NavigationSplitView + palette + preferredColorScheme), WebPicMain injects stores. Build+bundle+screenshot both themes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicApp/RootView.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/WebPicMain.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/MainView.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Import/EmptyImportView.swift", "Sources/WebPicApp/Settings/SettingsPlaceholderView.swift"], "verifyCommand": "bash Scripts/bundle.sh && open dist/WebPic.app", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty/import screen on launch", "import seeds mock + populates sidebar", "toolbar segmented+code+export present", "light/dark both render correctly"]}
```
